Submission received

Your hiring brief is in

Your request is in the hiring review queue. We will look at budget, workflow, timeline, content format, and portfolio requirements before matching it with editors.

Improve your brief Hiring guide

Next

What happens now

  1. Gather 2 or 3 examples of the edit style you want.
  2. Clarify source footage volume, revision process, and deadline.
  3. Watch your email for follow-up if the brief needs more detail.

Share

Help the early list get stronger

Share with an editor Invite editors who should be considered as the early talent list grows. Send the hiring guide A useful resource for anyone writing a clearer editor brief. Post another brief Use this when a second role, channel, or project needs a separate editor profile. Share the job template Give another hiring team the structure editors need before judging a role. Send the community page A neutral page for people who want to understand both sides of the early market.
